news.title: Why Cognition bought Poke: AI personality is becoming a competitive advantage
news.summary: AI coding startup Cognition has acquired Poke, the AI assistant you text like a friend, in a deal valuing the startup in the low nine figures. news.title: US accuses American of allegedly wiping his phone using a ‘duress’ password during border search
news.summary: A U.S. citizen has asked a court to throw out the government's claim that he gave over a passcode to border authorities that wiped his phone's data, opening up fresh questions about a person's constitutional rights at the U.S. border.
